rag_rules: Repair AGREE syntax errors by correcting unresolved identifiers or invalid type declarations in annexes, not by altering AADL structure.
generic_rules: Fix type mismatches by aligning helper declarations with the actual AADL feature types.
Use only int, real, or bool as scalar types in AGREE declarations; never integer or boolean.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
Guarantees and assumptions must reference only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or data types not declared in the model or its dependencies.
